active_goal: Improve MemoryOS Lite v3 into a benchmark-usable Letta-style agent memory system for LongMemEval and LoCoMo, without demo-only phase completion, without hiding case-level regressions, and without enabling the v3 kernel by default.

context_bundle.summary: Phase 7 is narrowed to opt-in v3 kernel/tool durability: denied tool non-execution, approval pause/resume replayability, tool result trace/context visibility, and public benchmark kernel trace smoke without changing v3 default, v1 fallback, or kernel default-off behavior.

stale_artifacts.reason: Exists before the current context bundle and does not cite work/phase-7/context_bundle.md; do not use as current review evidence.
Targets old legacy deprecation wording and is stale relative to the active Letta-style benchmark usability blueprint.

failing_tests_required_before_implementa: Denied archive_write or unknown tool request produces a denial trace/result and does not create archival memory.
Approval pause/resume state survives the step boundary used by benchmark/kernel smoke and resumed execution happens exactly once.
Executed archive_write emits tool result trace detail and a later-context-visible tool result message/log entry when relevant.
Public benchmark keeps kernel_trace_events empty when MEMORYOS_AGENT_KERNEL is unset/off.
Public benchmark reports non-empty kernel_trace_events when MEMORYOS_MEMORY_ARCH=v3 and MEMORYOS_AGENT_KERNEL=v1 are explicitly set.
implementation_guardrails: Do not enable MEMORYOS_AGENT_KERNEL by default.
Do not change MEMORYOS_MEMORY_ARCH=v3 default or MEMORYOS_MEMORY_ARCH=v1 fallback.
Do not add Letta as a runtime dependency.
Do not expand tool support beyond archive_write unless a failing test and real chain need require it.
Do not tune answer prompts or claim answer-quality improvement from kernel trace work.
Do not revert unrelated workspace changes.

kernel_public_smoke: MEMORYOS_MEMORY_ARCH=v3 MEMORYOS_AGENT_KERNEL=v1 uv run memoryos eval public --benchmark longmemeval --data-path benchmarks/longmemeval/longmemeval.json --baseline memoryos_lite --limit 5 --no-llm-answer --no-llm-judge

MEMORYOS_MEMORY_ARCH=v3 MEMORYOS_AGENT_KERNEL=v1 uv run memoryos eval public --benchmark locomo --data-path benchmarks/locomo/locomo10.json --baseline memoryos_lite --limit 5 --no-llm-answer --no-llm-judge
conditional_milestone: Only if Phase 7 changes answer/context behavior: run LongMemEval and LoCoMo 30-case full-chain LLM judge in parallel with MEMORYOS_MEMORY_ARCH=v3 and MEMORYOS_AGENT_KERNEL=v1 explicitly set.

usable_ack_checklist: ack_level is usable and active_goal is referenced.
context_bundle.path is work/phase-7/context_bundle.md and plan/execute/review cite it.
real_path_wired is true for the opt-in v3 public benchmark path.
RED tests were added or updated before production changes.
Verification includes focused kernel tests, default-off public benchmark test, opt-in public benchmark test or smoke, full pytest, and ruff unless explicitly scoped with evidence.
case-level eval records LongMemEval and LoCoMo kernel smoke separately; no aggregate-only claim.
review_verdict confirms v1 fallback preserved, v3 default preserved, kernel default unchanged, source grounding not regressed, and LoCoMo not hidden or unexplained.
review_focus: Behavioral regression in v1 fallback or default v3 kernel-off path.
Denied tool execution accidentally writing memory.
Tool result trace exists but is not durable or not visible to later context when claimed.
Public benchmark fields are misleading or absent when kernel is opt-in.
LoCoMo residual failures hidden by kernel trace success.
Any lane output that ignores context_bundle.md.

lane_instructions.plan_storm: Run a brainstorming lane with gpt-5.5 high effort. It must read work/phase-7/context_bundle.md before god_dispatch.json, compare 2-3 implementation options, recommend one, and write # phase: phase-7 to work/phase-7/brainstorm.md.
lane_instructions.plan_draft: Read context_bundle.md, brainstorm.md, and god_dispatch.json. Write spec.md and plan.md with RED -> GREEN -> REFACTOR -> smoke -> review.
lane_instructions.plan_self_review: Run review lane with gpt-5.5 high effort. Check active goal, anti-demo gate, v1 fallback, v3 default, kernel opt-in, benchmark overfitting, and context-bundle use. PASS writes plan_final.md; FAIL writes plan_review.md and requires iteration.
lane_instructions.execute: Only execute_lane may edit src/tests/docs. Each implementation task must follow TDD, with failing tests before production changes.
lane_instructions.review: Read-only review must inspect context_bundle.md, god_dispatch.json, plan_final.md, result.md, execute_review.md, and git diff before ack.
